headline: GE Aerospace Taps US China Deal For Long Term Engine Revenue
summary: GE Aerospace, part of General Electric (NYSE:GE), is positioned to supply hundreds of jet engines for Boeing aircraft tied to a new US China aircraft deal. The agreement involves more than 200 Boeing planes, marking the first large Boeing sale to China in nearly a decade. The deal is expected to create a multi year stream of engine deliveries and follow on services for GE Aerospace. The arrangement highlights GE's role in global commercial aviation supply chains as international aircraft...
